disambiguation_rules.the secretary: context indicates this refers to the Secretary of Transportation (FAA's parent department)
disambiguation_rules.the administrator: context indicates this is the FAA Administrator
disambiguation_rules.the chief operating officer: context indicates this is the FAA Chief Operating Officer

oddities.note: Section 2(c) references 'Assistant Administrator for Advanced Aviation' but no appointment mechanism is specified in the text; this role appears to be derived from the broader Deputy Administrator responsibilities.
